message.content:
The lwl/lwr formula works correctly. Now let me apply the correct formulas to vm.js and fix the issue. Let me also trace what's happening at the W_CacheLumpNum level:

{
  "analysis": "The lwl/lwr formula-based approach works correctly. The issue must be elsewhere. Let me apply the correct lwl/lwr formulas to vm.js and also trace the actual lumpinfo data being read by W_CacheLumpNum.",
  "plan": "Apply correct lwl/lwr formulas and add a trace at Z_Malloc to dump the lumpinfo entry.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'PYEOF'
with open('/app/vm.js', 'r') as f:
    c = f.read()

# Replace lwl with formula-based approach
old_lwl = c[c.index('case 34: {'):c.index('case 34: {')+200]
new_lwl = 'case 34: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, mv = r32(al); const sh = (3 - bo) * 8; const mask = sh === 0 ? 0 : ((1 << sh) - 1) >>> 0; R[rt] = ((mv << sh) >>> 0 | (R[rt] & mask)) >>> 0; break; }'
c = c.replace(old_lwl, new_lwl)
print('Fixed lwl')

# Replace lwr with formula-based approach
old_lwr_start = c.index('case 38: { const a')
old_lwr = c[old_lwr_start:old_lwr_start+200]
new_lwr = 'case 38: { const a = (R[rs] + si) >>> 0, al = a & ~3, bo = a & 3, mv = r32(al); const sh = bo * 8; const mask = sh === 0 ? 0 : (0xFFFFFFFF << (32 - sh)) >>> 0; R[rt] = ((mv >>> sh) | (R[rt] & mask)) >>> 0; break; }'
c = c.replace(old_lwr, new_lwr)
print('Fixed lwr')

with open('/app/vm.js', 'w') as f:
    f.write(c)
print('Done')
PYEOF
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "node -c /app/vm.js && echo 'OK'
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "grep 'case 34:' /app/vm.js | grep -c 'sh ='
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "timeout 15 node vm.js > /tmp/trace7.txt 2>&1; grep -aE 'Z_Malloc size|^R fd=' /tmp/trace7.txt | head -10
",
      "duration": 20.0
    }
  ]
}
